data.title: Mars acquires Kellanova, adding Pringles, Cheez-It, and other brands to its portfolio. Shapes future of snacking.
data.description: Mars, Incorporated, a prominent global company in pet care, snacking, and food, has confirmed the finalization of its acquisition of Kellanova. This acquisition includes popular brands such as Pringles, Cheez-It, Pop-Tarts, Rice Krispies Treats, RXBAR, and Kellogg's international cereal brands. By merging these two renowned companies, Mars and Kellanova unite their cherished brands, rich histories, and exceptional strengths. This acquisition is set to play a significant role in shaping the future of snacking.

data.title: Ciena's stock hits 52-week high with record Q4 results: $1.35 billion revenue, 20.3% YoY growth, 91 cents EPS beats estimates. AI demand propels growth.
data.description: Shares of Ciena Corporation (CIEN) surged after the company released its fiscal Q4 2025 results, showcasing a remarkable 20.3% year-on-year revenue growth to $1.35 billion. This figure exceeded analysts' expectations of $1.29 billion. Moreover, their adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 91 cents, surpassing the projected 77 cents. Ciena primarily generates revenue via networking hardware sales, with some contributions from software and services. The significant demand comes from major cloud and telecom providers seeking high-speed connectivity for AI infrastructure. CEO anticipates robust growth in 2026.
TIME MAGAZINE NAMES 'ARCHITECTS OF AI' AS PERSON OF THE YEAR

data.title: Bybit offers personalized annual recap of traders' journey in 2025. 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, as of December 11, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has introduced a new feature for users to access a personalized yearly summary of their trading activities on the platform. This recap option allows users to review their individual trading journey on Bybit as the year 2025 comes to an end. This enhancement offers insights into personal trading statistics and achievements throughout the year.

data.title: Massimo Group to showcase new MVR HVAC Pro Series at 2026 PGA Show in Orlando with climate-controlled electric vehicles.
data.description: A company based in Garland, Texas, Massimo Group, revealed plans to showcase its latest MVR HVAC Pro Series at the upcoming 2026 PGA Show in Orlando, Florida. Known for manufacturing and distributing powersports and electric vehicles, Massimo Group, listed on NASDAQ as MAMO, will introduce this innovative product line at the event. The debut of the MVR HVAC Pro Series is highly anticipated and marks an exciting development in the industry's evolution.

data.title: SLB partners with Shell to create digital, AI solutions for energy industry. Aim to enhance efficiency and performance.
data.description: Houston-based energy technology firm SLB, listed on NYSE as SLB, has recently partnered with Shell to form a strategic collaboration focusing on digital and AI innovations. This partnership aims to enhance operational efficiency in upstream operations for both companies as well as the broader industry. The goal of this collaboration is to create AI-powered solutions that will empower technical professionals and decision-makers. The objective is to establish an open data platform to drive performance improvements.

data.title: By 2027, YouTube TV expected to become top US pay-TV operator, surpassing Charter and Comcast - Omdia report.
data.description: In London, YouTube TV is making waves in the US television industry. Omdia predicts that by 2027, YouTube TV will overtake Charter and Comcast to become the leading pay-TV provider in the United States. This milestone marks the first instance of a virtual pay-TV service taking the top spot in the market. Omdia's analysis showcases the rapid growth of YouTube TV and its increasing presence in the traditional pay-TV sector. This shift in the US Pay-TV landscape reflects the evolving preferences of consumers towards digital streaming services.

data.title: Toshiba introduces new mobile solutions for retailers like Away with TCx® M7 and TCx® M11 to enhance connected experiences.
data.description: Toshiba introduces its latest mobile solutions, the TCx® M7 and TCx® M11, in Research Triangle Park, N.C. These innovative products aim to provide retailers with connected technology that improves customer experiences at various touchpoints.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners Corp. prices $300M IPO with 30M units at $10 each, listing on Nasdaq.
data.description: In Scranton, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. revealed the details of its initial public offering, consisting of 30,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market for trading.

data.title: Sono Solar's refrigerated vehicle solution wins European Transport Prize for Sustainability 2026, highlighting growth in solar tech for commercial vehicles.
data.description: The increasing acceptance of integrated solar technology for commercial vehicles is highlighted by acknowledgment from major OEMs. This recognition signifies a significant rise in the adoption of this technology within the industry. This trend is reinforced by a growing number of companies integrating solar solutions into their commercial vehicles, with a notable increase of 25% in installations reported over the past year. The support from key players in the sector further emphasizes the importance and relevance of this innovative approach to sustainability in transportation.

data.title: FinTech CEO Jeff Brodsly of 100GROUP named Good Neighbor of the Year at Moorpark Chamber for community impact.
data.description: In Moorpark, California, FinTech CEO Jeff Brodsly from 100GROUP has been honored as the Good Neighbor of the Year by the Moorpark Chamber for his significant contributions to the community. Brodsly's dedication to philanthropy and long-standing impact on the area were recognized in the award announcement.

data.title: Summit Radiology partners with HAP for revenue cycle management; largest radiology group in Fort Wayne with 40+ locations.
data.description: In Media, PA, Healthcare Administrative Partners (HAP) shared news of adding Summit Radiology from Fort Wayne, IN to their clients for revenue cycle management services. Summit Radiology is a prominent full-service diagnostic and interventional radiology group in the region, operating at more than 40 outpatient and hospital sites in the northeastern area. This addition highlights HAP's expansion in providing billing, coding, and practice management solutions for radiology practices, showcasing their expertise in the field.

data.title: SkyMirr's Sky5G Router certified for use on T-Mobile's network, a significant milestone for the company.
data.description: A company based in Melbourne, Fla., called SkyMirr, revealed today that their cutting-edge 5G wireless router, Sky5G™, has successfully obtained certification for operation on T-Mobile’s network.

data.title: DigitalChalk will be featured on CNBC's Now We Know! show, showcasing LMS innovation and success in training, compliance, and skills growth.
data.description: A company based in Asheville, North Carolina, called DigitalChalk is set to be featured on CNBC's Now We Know! The segment will showcase their innovative Learning Management System (LMS) and the tangible outcomes it has brought in corporate training, compliance, and skill enhancement for the workforce.

data.title: Surgery Partners, Inc. plans to offer $425.0 million in senior unsecured notes due 2032 through its subsidiary.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee on December 11, 2025, Surgery Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ:SGRY), a top short-stay surgical facility owner, revealed plans for Surgery Center Holdings, Inc., its wholly owned subsidiary, to potentially offer an additional $425.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 7.250% senior unsecured notes due 2032 (the “Notes”). The Notes are set to be guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by each domestic wholly-owned subsidiary of the Issuer. This offering is in connection with the issuance of the same series as the Issuer’s 7.250% senior notes due 2032 that were originally issued in April 2024.

data.title: StayTerra appoints Michael Toscano as CFO with 25 years experience in finance, travel, and hospitality industries.
data.description: StayTerra, a platform of leading vacation rental brands in prime U.S. destinations, disclosed new leadership team appointments today in New York. Michael Toscano has been named Chief Financial Officer, bringing more than 25 years of finance and strategic planning expertise in travel, hospitality, and consumer services. Mr. Toscano previously held the CFO position at dancker and has significant experience in the industry. The company aims to enhance its financial management and strategic initiatives with his valuable experience.

data.title: Loenbro partners with Kohlberg for growth in data center services - Kohlberg to acquire majority stake in the company.
data.description: Loenbro, LLC, based in Westminster, Colo., a provider of technical services for data centers and critical infrastructure, has recently finalized a deal with Kohlberg, a prominent U.S. middle market private equity firm. The agreement entails Kohlberg acquiring a majority share in Loenbro to propel the company's growth and development. As per the deal, Braemont Capital and current management at Loenbro will also maintain a stake in the company. This move is aimed at accelerating Loenbro's expansion in the market.

data.title: VENU plans $150M entertainment venue in Texas, 12,500-capacity amphitheater in Webster, Houston area.
data.description: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation (NYSE American: VENU) announced a significant development. The company, known for upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations, disclosed a Letter of Intent with the City of Webster in the Greater Houston, Texas area. This agreement aims to establish a cutting-edge amphitheater named Sunset Amphitheater Houston at Webster, with a 12,500 capacity. The project, powered by EIGHT Elite Light Beer, is set to become a multi-seasonal attraction in Southeast Texas.

data.title: Tanishq debuts in Orlando at The Florida Mall with its 1,800 sq. ft. boutique store opening on October 4.
data.description: In the bustling city of Orlando, Florida, Tanishq, a renowned Indian fine jewelry brand, made its grand debut at The Florida Mall. The 1,800 square foot boutique, located close to the Primark entrance on 8001 S. Orange Blossom Trail, marked the brand's first foray into the Florida market. With its launch on October 4, customers were invited to explore the exquisite offerings of the store.
